pages.text: $(l)Mana Lantern$() — A glass-shelled luminary powered by a single aether shard, framed in iron nuggets. Emits full daylight (light 15), never extinguishes, ignores rain.
$(l)Aether Glass$() — An aether-laced pane: transparent, faintly glowing (light 4), and propagates skylight. Requires $(l)Silk Touch$() to harvest intact.
